zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I於1205年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o沃達波時，他的父親Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne29歲，母親Huguette de Chamalières30歲。他於1239年之後與Alésie de VENTADOUR結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1262年5月17日在法國奧維普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I于1205年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o沃達波时，他的父亲Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne29岁，母亲Huguette de Chamalières30岁。他于1239年之后与Alésie de VENTADOUR结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1262年5月17日在法国奧維普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dauphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Emile, Antoine, Benoit, Carmelle, Fernand, Georges, Jean Claude, Laure, Luckner, Maryse.

French and Haitian: from the French personal name Dauphin, from Latin Delphinus, derived from Greek delphis ‘dolphin’. This name was borne by a 4th-century Christian saint who was bishop of Bordeaux, and from the early 12th century it was in use as a hereditary personal name in the family of the counts of Albon, so that it soon came to be used as a title and led to their territory (capital Grenoble) being known as the Dauphiné. When it became part of the Kingdom of France in 1349, the title of dauphin thereafter denoted the heir-apparent to the throne, and it is possible that in some cases this is the origin of the surname, either denoting a member of the Dauphin's household or applied as a nickname in the sense of ‘prince’.

variants.name: Dauphine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Aurelien.
French (Dauphiné): habitational name from the Dauphiné region of southeastern France (see Dauphin ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I was born in 1205, in Vodable, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne, was 29 and his mother, Huguette de Chamalières, was 30. He married Alésie de VENTADOUR after 1239. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 May 1262, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I est né en 1205, à Vodable, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Huguette de Chamalières, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Alésie de VENTADOUR après 1239. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1262, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I 1205 in Vodable, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne 29 und seine Mutter Huguette de Chamalières 30. Er hat nach 1239 Alésie de VENTADOUR geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Mai 1262 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I è nato il nel 1205 nel Vodable, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Huguette de Chamalières, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Alésie de VENTADOUR dopo il 1239. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 maggio 1262, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne Iが1205年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメボダブルで生まれた時，父Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergneは29歳，母Huguette de Chamalièresは30歳であった。1239年以後にAlésie de VENTADOURと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1262年5月17日にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I(이)가 1205년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 보다블일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Huguette de Chamalières(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1239년 이후 Alésie de VENTADOUR(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1262년 5월 17일 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I nasceu em 1205, em Vodable, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Huguette de Chamalières, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Alésie de VENTADOUR após 1239. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1262, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I родился в 1205 г. в местности фодабл, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Huguette de Chamalières, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Alésie de VENTADOUR после 1239 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 мая 1262 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I nació en 1205, en Vodable, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Dauphin d'Auvergne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Huguette de Chamalières, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Alésie de VENTADOUR después de 1239. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1262, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 57 años.
